examples: Today, he forecast 'flattish' demand for networks this year.
Without the December snow, reckon the statisticians, output would have been "flattish".
Domestic pricing pressures remain very weak and the labor market will likely remain flattish.
At least in a world where everything is a slight variation on the flattish silver box.
Most of the technology sector is flattish with corporate spending on information technology becalmed.
